zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh Bernanke於大約1255年出生在英國諾福爾可波時，他的父親Mr. ? Bernanke20歲，母親unknown19歲。他於大約1278年與Maud de Woodthorpe在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾薩利比結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1339年在英國藍卡爾享年85歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh Bernanke于大约1255年出生在英国諾福爾可波时，他的父亲Mr. ? Bernanke20岁，母亲unknown19岁。他于大约1278年与Maud de Woodthorpe在英国英格兰林可爾史爾薩利比结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1339年在英国藍卡爾享年85岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh Bernanke was born about 1255, in Burgh, Norfolk, England, his father, Mr. ? Bernanke, was 20 and his mother, unknown, was 19. He married Maud de Woodthorpe about 1278, in Saleby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died in 1339, in Lancashire, England, at the age of 85.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh Bernanke est né environ 1255, à Burgh, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Mr. ? Bernanke, avait 20 ans et sa mère, unknown, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Maud de Woodthorpe environ 1278, à Saleby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé en 1339, à Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 85 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh Bernankeが約1255年にイギリスノーフォルクブルグで生まれた時，父Mr. ? Bernankeは20歳，母unknownは19歳であった。約1278年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアサレビーでMaud de Woodthorpeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1339年にイギリスランカシュアイアで85歳で死去した。

ko.Bernake Hall, Burgh le Marsh, Lincolnsh: 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 버그 일 마시
ko.lifeSummary: Hugh Bernanke(이)가 대략 1255년 영국 노르폴크 버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Mr. ? Bernanke(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 unknown(은)는 19세였다. 그는 대략 1278년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 살일비에서 Maud de Woodthorpe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1339년 영국 랭카실르에서 85세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Bernanke nasceu aproximadamente 1255, em Burgh, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Mr. ? Bernanke, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, unknown, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud de Woodthorpe aproximadamente 1278, em Saleby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1339, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 85 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh Bernanke родился около 1255 г. в местности бург, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Mr. ? Bernanke было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали unknown, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud de Woodthorpe около 1278 г. в местности сеилеби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер в 1339 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 85 лет.
